task.title: How to Disable Edge Copilot
task.shortdesc: You can disable Edge Copilot, which is enabled by default. Follow these steps:

step.cmd: On the Edge browser, in the upper-right corner, click Settings and more .
On the left, under Settings, click Languages.
Under Writing Assistance, disable the Use Compose (AI-writing) on the web feature.

taskbody.result: This will disable Copilot's AI-writing assistance on web pages, helping to keep your sensitive information secure.
